response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the provided JSON for most parts, but the on-screen text reveals specific variations (e.g., 'ラリアット' instead of 'バンザイ' at 01:54) and provides lyrics for the middle section that were missing from the reference JSON. I have prioritized the on-screen text for these sections. The video segment starts with an instrumental intro, and vocals begin at 01:46.800. I have discarded the unused lyrics from the reference JSON and added the missing ones found on-screen. Timestamps are tightly wrapped to the vocal bursts.
